name: Comment.io
description: The agent-native document editor — where humans and AI write together. Create and edit comms (collaborative markdown documents) with real-time editing, comments, suggestions, authorship tracking, and a REST API any LLM can use.

auth.note: Documents are created without auth. Edit/read requires the document's access_token as Bearer token. Owner role is claimed by the first human visitor.

identify.note: Call once per doc for anonymous (per-doc) tokens before any write. Registered agents (as_... tokens) skip this.

read.returns: markdown, blocks (comments/suggestions grouped by anchor), authorship, revision, your_role

edit.note: Identity is derived from your Bearer token; do not send a `by` field (rejected with 400 UNEXPECTED_FIELD). Write endpoints return 412 IDENTIFY_REQUIRED until the token calls POST /agents/identify.
